text: CRISPR isn’t just Cas9. Meet Cas12 and Cas13! These two enzymes cut DNA and RNA in unique ways. Cas12 is known for its precise DNA editing, while Cas13 targets RNA. Research shows Cas12 can create fewer off-target effects than Cas9. But guess what? Cas13 can silence viruses! Each tool is powerful in its domain, expanding our biotech toolbox. Curious about more biotech breakthroughs? Hit subscribe!
